preview_text: Theres a lot of missing animations and VFX that need to be finished
The buggiest POS I've ever made...but when it works, its game changing
The Legendary Son of Sparda from DMC5 playing as Drunk Homeless Man from League of Legends

entry.entry_body: <video controls class='basic-video-style m-y-5 m-x-a text-center w-50'><source src='/videos/large/DMC5-Vergil-as-Yasuo.webm' type='video/webm'></video>

2.0 Update is LIVE!

NEW NEW NEWWWW!!!!
I FIXED YASUO'S HUNCHED BACK!! VERGIL HAS BEEN CURED!

Mod info

For BASE SKIN Yasuo only. Will not work with other skins!

Description

For when you're literally the story that is approaching. I PROMISE you, you'll be a better Yasuo player with this mod. IDK why.

Credits

The assets were sourced by CAPCOM's DMC5 video game! All rights go to their respective owners. I do not claim to own any of the work/assets used by the mod.I do claim ownership of the effort put behind the formation of the mod itself.

Bugs

None so far! Join the discord to report any problems you have with the mod!

How to contribute

ALL OF MY MODS ARE FREE TO MODIFY IN EXCHANGE FOR CREDIT! Send me a DM and I'll give you whatever file you need to get started, including the link to the repo! Just please, credit me, and all parties that deserve credit! I LOVE CLOUT. RAAAAAAAAAHHHH

Mod rank

You went out of your way to look at my mod(s), and I couldn't be more grateful to you.What are weights???The model was given rough-weightsThe model has 0.5 weights on major joints, like arms and legsThe model was 100% weighted by meThis uses weights from the original source model
Model/WeightingX
I make these mods for you all, and I am fueled by the wonderful praise I received from each of you.I made them 😭Riot Games™ made them 😔Some animations were replaced utilizing various techniquesAnimations were created by source animations mirroring to the rigAnimations were imported by the source
AnimationsX
With each praise, I go back and make my mods better. You keep my mods alive and well, my life's work.I made them 😭UntouchedSome voice lines were changedAll the voice lines were changedBoth voice lines and SFX were changed
SFX and voice linesX
Because of you are who you are, I can keep going. And I hope to see you again.I made them 😭UntouchedCreated by a professional
Ability IconsX
You are priceless to me.
With love,
Valentine		UntouchedColor-shiftedAdjusted/Trimmed/TweakedCustom VFX
VFX/ParticlesX
This mod is considered:

version_history.patch_note: Fixed bug with squares/missing assets on Flying Judgement Cut
Updated healthbar to fix font size
Fixed squares that would appear on tornado
Had a really awesome particle effect for Vergil, but the inconsistency of cslol/ritobin prevented me from using it
Consolidated similar mods into single folder;Updated skin animations to match DMC5 vergil anims
Fixed vfx flying away from Yasuo
Fixed frozen animations that Vergil would do after joke

preview_text: The deadweight himself as my feeding support! I had daydreams of Nero being Blitzcrank, and I finally got around to making it

entry.entry_body: <video controls class='basic-video-style m-y-5 m-x-a text-center w-50'><source src='/videos/large/DMC5-Deadweight-as-Blitzcrank.webm' type='video/webm'></video>

2.0 Update is LIVE!

NEW NEW NEWWWW!!!!
NERO DOESNT HAVE THE WORST, EYE-BLEEDING, SOUL-TEARING ANIMATIONS ANYMORE!

Mod info

For BASE SKIN Blitzcrank only. Will not work with other skins!

Description

I woke up in a cold sweat and realized that Nero and Blitzcrank share too many abilities. And then my quest started. This skin might honestly make you a worse Blitzcrank player, but at least you'll look stylish

Credits

The assets were sourced by CAPCOM's DMC5 video game! All rights go to their respective owners. I do not claim to own any of the work/assets used by the mod. I do claim ownership of the effort put behind the formation of the mod itself.

Bugs

His channel and laugh animations aren't done. I have no intentions of fixing it because its a reminder of what the skin looked like before I had to animated it. But it adds charm to the skin, AND YOURE FREAKING NERO!!!! Also, when his shield passive is proc'd, he will keep saying 'told you, told you, told you' on repeat. That is my fault; I didn't know Blitz played that sound on repeat

How to contribute

version_history.patch_note: Nero's hair will now use the transparency property in his texture file;No longer say 'told ya' every second his passive is up;Shrunk icons to fit inside better
Gave cool icons to Nero Blitz's abilities
His animations have been replaced to resemble Nero's
Fixed all anims to not have locked keyframes after finished

preview_text: The other Legendary Son of Sparda from DCM5 playing as Dante-wannabe from League of Legends

entry.entry_body: <video controls class='basic-video-style m-y-5 m-x-a text-center w-50'><source src='/videos/large/DMC5-Dante-as-Samira.webm' type='video/webm'></video>

Mod info

For BASE SKIN Samira only. Will not work with other skins!

Description

J A C K P O T.
This is a reskin of Kinghound's Dante as Samira skinThe original mod used DMC3 Dante. This mod replaces the voicelines and model with DMC5 assets.

Credits

The assets were sourced by CAPCOM's DMC5 video game! All rights go to their respective owners. I do not claim to own any of the work/assets used by the mod. I do claim ownership of the effort put behind the formation of the mod itself.

Bugs

His body looks horribly deformed. Yes, I know. Samira's body DOES NOT line up to Dante's at all. Because of this, the sword is also piercing his back. To fix this, you'd need to reanimate the skin, and there's around 80 animations for base skin Samira. And I don't get paid to do any of this. My obsession fuels me.

How to contribute

ALL OF MY MODS ARE FREE TO MODIFY IN EXCHANGE FOR CREDIT! Send me a DM and I'll give you whatever file you need to get started, including the link to the repo! Just please, credit me, and all parties that deserve credit! I LOVE CLOUT. RAAAAAAAAAHHHH

Optional software

I made a macro that scans your screen and plays music based on your ult status as Samira. You can use any song you'd like, but I personally use Subhuman and Devil Trigger. You must have a way to measure your screen, in pixels, and a text editor. If you have any troubles, or want the songs I use, please join my discord server and ping me!

Download optional software

Mod rank

You went out of your way to look at my mod(s), and I couldn't be more grateful to you.What are weights???The model was given rough-weightsThe model has 0.5 weights on major joints, like arms and legsThe model was 100% weighted by meThis uses weights from the original source model
Model/WeightingX
I make these mods for you all, and I am fueled by the wonderful praise I received from each of you.I made them 😭Riot Games™ made them 😔Some animations were replaced utilizing various techniquesAnimations were created by source animations mirroring to the rigAnimations were imported by the source
AnimationsX
With each praise, I go back and make my mods better. You keep my mods alive and well, my life's work.I made them 😭UntouchedSome voice lines were changedAll the voice lines were changedBoth voice lines and SFX were changed
SFX and voice linesX
Because of you are who you are, I can keep going. And I hope to see you again.I made them 😭UntouchedCreated by a professional
Ability IconsX
You are priceless to me.
With love,
Valentine		UntouchedColor-shiftedAdjusted/Trimmed/TweakedCustom VFX
VFX/ParticlesX
This mod is considered:

Updated to work with the new skin line
Fixed font size of name above healthbar
Replaced voice lines with other voice lines from DMC5

entry.entry_body:
Mod info

For BASE SKIN Smolder only. Will not work with other skins!

Description

This is supposed to be paired up with "DMC5 V as Hwei" and played botlane. But as I was playing base-skin Smolder, I REALLY hated his voice, and his look, and anims, and everything. So I rushed this skin out and use this whenever I have to play Smolder. So there is no video for him, because he's probably the lowest-effort skin I've ever made

entry.entry_body: <video controls class='basic-video-style m-y-5 m-x-a w-50'><source src='/videos/large/DMC4-Berial-as-Hecarim.webm' type='video/webm'></video>

Mod info

For BASE SKIN Hecarim only. Will not work with other skins!

Description

I asked a poll of what the next skin mod should be, and Pinhetro voted for this skin. It wasn't the first to be made, but because he voted, this skin was eventually made and dedicated to him.

Credits

The assets were sourced by CAPCOM's DMC4 video game! All rights go to their respective owners. I do not claim to own any of the work/assets used by the mod. I do claim ownership of the effort put behind the formation of the mod itself.

Bugs

Some particle effects are still Hecarim's, and every patch runs the risk of turning all the particle effects into squares. His tail is also stiff, but thats because Hecarim's tail is so small 😂

His arms and legs are not attached and its ruins the immersion. I couldn't fix it without completely breaking the mod. Since no one plays Skarner, I think this won't affect too many people
